hero.title: Pack your files.
hero.description: Select files from any project, add context, copy everything in one click. No install. No signup.

features.dragDropDesc: Instantly index local files with a single drop. We leverage modern browser APIs to access your local file system securely without uploads.
features.perProjectDesc: Attach specific prompts or architectural notes to every pack. Ensure your AI understands "why" behind code you're pasting.
features.tokenAwareDesc: Get live token counts for your selection. Optimize your context window for Claude 3.5, GPT-4o, or any other large language model.

workflow.title: Three steps to total context.
workflow.step1Desc: Drag your project folder into window. It indexes locally, immediately.
workflow.step2Desc: Cherry-pick exactly what AI needs to see. No more file-bloat.
workflow.step3Desc: One click copies entire pack with instructions. Paste and go.

cta.title: Stop manually copying code blocks.
cta.availableNow: Available now in any modern browser

context.current: Current Context: Define scope of your pack or technical constraints here...
context.tooltip: Define scope of your pack or technical constraints here. This context helps system understand relationships between your selected files.

ignoreSettings.placeholder:
One rule per line, for example:
.env
*.env
node_modules/
dist/

emptyState.dropFolderTitle: Drop a folder to get started
emptyState.browseSubtitle: Or click to browse your files
emptyState.supportText: Supports any folder · Reads locally · Nothing is uploaded
emptyState.howItWorksDesc: Select a project directory or documentation folder — feedbag will convert it into AI-ready context you can paste anywhere.
